nasb.text: “Either make the tree good and its fruit good, or make the tree bad and its fruit bad; for the tree is known by its fruit.

esv.text: “Either make the tree good and its fruit good, or make the tree bad and its fruit bad,     for the tree is known by its fruit.

cnv.text: “你們種好樹就結好果子，種壞樹就結壞果子；憑著果子就能認出樹來。

ccb.text: “好树结好果子，坏树结坏果子，看果子就能知道树的好坏。

csbs.text: “你们让一棵树好，它的果子就好；你们让一棵树坏，它的果子就坏；这样，一棵树是凭着果子被认出来。
